message:
fix(core): add session_correlation stub to unblock compilation

lib.rs declares `pub mod session_correlation` but the file was missing,
causing cargo check to fail. This adds a minimal stub placeholder until
the full implementation lands (wa-nu4.2.4.2).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+//! Session correlation: maps external sessions to internal pane/event data.
+//!
+//! Provides a stable session key for correlating cass search results
+//! with wa's internal storage. See wa-nu4.2.4.2 for the full spec.
+
+// Placeholder: session correlation logic will be wired here once
+// the stable session key design is finalized (wa-nu4.2.4.2).
